query:
SELECT j.id as jobId, j.title, j.status as jobStatus,
  COUNT(s.id) as totalScenes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed
FROM musicVideoJobs j
JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.status = 'rendering'
GROUP BY j.id, j.title, j.status
ORDER BY j.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3XWfTC2fh8LVhku.root --database ALJHDNsuNA7bExFuoQZUsx --execute SELECT j.id as jobId, j.title, j.status as jobStatus,
  COUNT(s.id) as totalScenes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'generating' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as generating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.mvSceneStatus = 'failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed
FROM musicVideoJobs j
JOIN musicVideoScenes s ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.status = 'rendering'
GROUP BY j.id, j.title, j.status
ORDER BY j.id DESC
LIMIT 10;
